title: Membership
description: An actor's membership in a team. This is the source of truth for who belongs to which team, and can carry per-team attributes like role. An actor can be a person or an agent.

actor_id.description: ID of the actor (person or agent) who belongs to this team.

actor_type.description: Whether this actor is a person or an agent.

role.description: This actor's role within this team (e.g. lead, contributor, observer).

created_at.description: Timestamp when this membership was created (ISO 8601).
